shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!dist'"' | head -20 && git status --short && rg -n \"supports|maxZoom|Zoom\" packages src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -200"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "yet-another-react-lightbox Zoom plugin custom slide zoom supports maxZoom" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "cat package.json && sed -n '1,180p' src/types.ts 2>/dev/null || true && rg -n \"export type.*Slide|interface.*Slide|type Slide\" src | head -100"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/plugins/video/index.ts && sed -n '1,180p' test/unit/test-utils.ts 2>/dev/null || sed -n '1,180p' test/unit/test-utils.tsx && rg -n \"type: \\\"video\\\"|render:.*slide|slide: \\(\\{ slide\" test/unit test/types/src | head -100"

/bin/bash -lc 'npx prettier --write src/plugins/zoom/index.ts src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx src/plugins/zoom/ZoomController.tsx src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts && npx vitest run test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts && npm run test:types'
/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- src/plugins/zoom && git status --short && sed -n '1,90p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts && sed -n '1,45p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts"
/bin/bash -lc 'npx prettier --write src/plugins/zoom/index.ts src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts && npm run build:js && npm run lint'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' docs/plugins/zoom.md && git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff --check"

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Zoom plugin supports custom slide types maxZoom" --limit 5 && nmem --json m add "The Zoom plugin now opts custom slide types into the interactive wrapper via zoom.supports. Non-image slides use zoom.maxZoom (number or current-slide callback) with an 8x fallback, while image slides retain natural-resolution max zoom. Zoom state eligibility is based on an active wrapper so unsupported custom slides remain unwrapped and disabled." -t "Zoom custom slide support" --unit-type decision -l zoom -s codex -i 0.8'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
